keys.meta_title: Vouus | ဆက်သွယ်ရန်
keys.meta_description: Sales, support, and enterprise contact channels.
keys.hero_title: ကျွန်ုပ်တို့ထံ ဆက်သွယ်ပါ
keys.hero_subtitle: Whether you're evaluating the platform, ready to start, or need help with an existing account—we reply within one business day.
keys.channels_0_description: Discuss pricing, migration support, or a custom Enterprise plan.
keys.channels_1_description: Email our team directly for questions about the platform, billing, or partnerships.
keys.channels_2_description: For existing customers with platform issues, visit our documentation and help centre.
keys.channels_3_description: Dedicated infrastructure, custom SLA, on-premise deployment, or technology partnerships.
keys.faq_0_q: How quickly will I hear back?
keys.faq_0_a: Sales enquiries are typically responded to within one business day. For existing customers, support response times depend on your plan tier.
keys.faq_2_q: I want to migrate from an existing ERP. Who should I contact?
keys.faq_2_a: Reach out via the Sales channel above. Our team will assess your current setup and guide you through the migration process.
keys.legalNote: Vouus is a product of PREGO Labs Pte. Ltd., incorporated in Singapore. For legal and privacy matters, see our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
